name: Ubiquiti UNAS 2 White
title: Ubiquiti UNAS 2 White
short_description: Compact Storage Solution. The Ubiquiti UNAS-2 is a compact and efficient Network Attached Storage (NAS) device designed for home and small office environments. It features two 3.5" HDD bays, allowing users to install high-capacity hard drives for ample storage space. The device is powered via PoE++ (Power over Ethernet Plus Plus), simplifying installation by reducing the need for additional power cables.
description: The Ubiquiti UNAS-2 is a compact and efficient Network Attached Storage (NAS) device designed for home and small office environments. It features two 3.5" HDD bays, allowing users to install high-capacity hard drives for ample storage space. The device is powered via PoE++ (Power over Ethernet Plus Plus), simplifying installation by reducing the need for additional power cables. With a maximum power consumption of 60W, it offers an energy-efficient solution for continuous operation. The UNAS-2 is built with a polycarbonate enclosure, ensuring durability while maintaining a sleek and modern appearance. Its compact form factor allows for easy placement in various environments without occupying significant space. Whether you're looking to store media files, backups, or other data, the UNAS-2 provides a reliable and space-saving solution.

detailed_description.heading: Compact Storage Solution
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UNAS-2 is a compact and efficient Network Attached Storage (NAS) device designed for home and small office environments. It features two 3.5" HDD bays, allowing users to install high-capacity hard drives for ample storage space. The device is powered via PoE++ (Power over Ethernet Plus Plus), simplifying installation by reducing the need for additional power cables. With a maximum power consumption of 60W, it offers an energy-efficient solution for continuous operation. The UNAS-2 is built with a polycarbonate enclosure, ensuring durability while maintaining a sleek and modern appearance. Its compact form factor allows for easy placement in various environments without occupying significant space. Whether you're looking to store media files, backups, or other data, the UNAS-2 provides a reliable and space-saving solution.

detailed_description.heading: Reliable Performance
detailed_description.text: Equipped with a quad-core ARM® Cortex®-A55 processor running at 1.7 GHz and 4 GB of memory, the UNAS-2 delivers reliable performance for everyday storage needs. It supports two 3.5" HDDs, providing ample storage capacity for data, backups, and media files. The device includes a 2.5 GbE RJ45 port, ensuring fast data transfer speeds to meet the demands of modern networking. Additionally, the UNAS-2 features a 5 Gbps USB-C port, allowing for easy expansion and connection to external devices. The system operates within an ambient temperature range of -5°C to 40°C and supports ambient humidity levels of 10% to 90% noncondensing, making it suitable for various environmental conditions. With its robust hardware and connectivity options, the UNAS-2 is designed to handle the storage needs of small-scale operations efficiently. Its performance capabilities ensure smooth data access and management, enhancing productivity in home and small office settings.

detailed_description.heading: User-Friendly Management
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UNAS-2 offers intuitive management through its 1.47" color LCM display, providing users with real-time system information and status updates. The device supports Bluetooth 4.1, enabling easy initial setup and configuration via compatible mobile devices. For ongoing management, the UNAS-2 utilizes Ethernet connectivity, allowing users to access and manage the system through a network connection. The device is compatible with UniFi Drive version 3.1.7 and later, providing a seamless and integrated storage management experience. With its user-friendly interface and connectivity options, the UNAS-2 ensures that users can efficiently manage their storage needs without complex configurations. Whether you're backing up important files, storing media content, or setting up a personal cloud, the UNAS-2 simplifies the process, making network-attached storage accessible and manageable for everyone.
